title: Why AI won’t replace strategy
description: Artificial intelligence isn’t a strategy. It’s the fastest, most unforgiving way to discover whether you actually have one.
content:
But beneath the noise lies a quieter and far more consequential reality: AI does not create strategic clarity. It reveals whether you had any to begin with.
I’ve argued previously that the next layer of advantage in corporate AI will not come from ow... [724 chars]

title: AI SCAMS: What they are and how to spot them
description: Artificial Intelligence is rapidly advancing, and so are the scams.
content:
Artificial Intelligence is rapidly advancing, and so are the scams.
They are becoming more convincing and harder to detect than ever before, so it is more critical now to stay vigilant.

title: How Agnikul's AI data centre in space would work: Co-founder explains
description: New Delhi, Mar 3 (PTI) Chennai-based Agnikul Cosmos would launch the prototype of an artificial intelligence (AI) data centre in orbit by the end of this year, aiming to make it commercially viable by 2027, the space company’s co-founder Srinath Ravichandran has said. AI data centres are used to train AI models and are huge […]
content: “The data centre will be used for AI inference (where a trained model is deployed to analyse new data and make predictions), which does not require as much energy and infrastructure as is needed for training a model,” Ravichandran said in an intervie... [2432 chars]

title: We’re Not in a Sci-Fi Thriller. We’re in the First Draft.
description: This content was provided by Kyiana Williams, CEO and founder of e.e.r.s., a civic engagement software. Most people meet artificial intelligence through Hollywood. Through the futuristic fantasy of Meet the Robinsons. Or through the apocalyptic “inevitability” in The Terminator. description: Europe risks falling behind in artificial intelligence if it doesn't speed up development of its networks, according to Ericsson AB chief executive officer Borje Ekholm.

title: Prasoon Joshi Discusses the Impact of AI on Creativity at DNPA Conclave 2026
description: At the DNPA Conclave 2026, Prasoon Joshi explores how artificial intelligence is reshaping creativity, ethics, and media consumption, emphasizing its role as an extension of human experience.
